name: NavigationProgress
searchText: navigationprogress navigation progress bar @mantine/nprogress /x/nprogress color initialprogress portalprops size stepinterval store withinportal zindex

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors of any other valid CSS color

props.name: portalProps
props.description: Props to pass down to the Portal when withinPortal is true

props.name: size
props.description: Controls height of the progress bar

props.name: withinPortal
props.description: Determines whether the progress bar should be rendered within Portal
